name: Circle Internet Group, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview Our mission is to raise global economic prosperity through the frictionless exchange of value. We were founded in 2013 on the belief that we could connect the world more deeply by building a new global economic system on the foundation of the internet, and facilitate the creation of a world where everyone, everywhere can share value as easily as we can today share information, content, and communications.
